_help.header_height_mm: Height of the blue header area on each slip.
_help.data_height_mm: Height of the white data area on each slip.
_help.top_margin_mm: Blank space at the top of each A4 page.
_help.bottom_margin_mm: Blank space at the bottom of each A4 page. The footer is drawn inside this area.
_help.column_gap_mm: Space between fields across the slip.
_help.padding_mm: Inner text padding inside each field area.
_help.cut_tick_mm: Length of small cut marks at the page edges.
_help.header_color: Header colour as a hex value.
_help.minimum_font_pt: Smallest text size allowed when fitting long text.
_help.show_footer: Show a small footer in the bottom page margin without changing slip positions.
_help.show_sheet_name: Show the Excel sheet name in the footer.
_help.show_generated_datetime: Show the generated date and time in the footer.
_help.show_page_numbers: Show page numbers as Page X of Y in the footer.
_help.footer_color: Footer text colour as a hex value.
